title: HideME
description: A Simple, Free-To-Use Vanish Plugin for PaperMC
body:
Like the project? Leave a Follow-♥️ on this Plugin!

## Downloads You can find downloads in the list below or by compiling from source. There are no alternative download links/pages that are official maintained by Qubik Studios when they are not shown here. #### Official maintained Download Links
Download now on CurseForge Download now on Modrinth
## Features Use the build in commands to hide you from the Server. This is a really simple Plugin and doesn't have the ability to hide you completely. Builtin in this Plugin is a vanish management System for handling leaving. If you are in vanish and leave, you will stay vanished until the Server Restarts or you get out of vanish. There are in total 3 different Commands: |Command | Permission | Description| |-------|-----|-----| |/vanish {player} | hideme.vanish.change | Hides the Player you have selected. Leave empty to hide yourself | |/reloadskin {player} | hideme.reloadskin | Reloads the Skin from you or the selected Player if it won't load after being in Vanish| |/revealvanished | hideme.revealvanished | shows a list with every vanished Player on the Server. Even when they are Offline.| ## Note on Server Owners You can use this Plugin on your Server as you like. This is a Free Plugin, so please don't sell features to your users. ## Need Help? Join our Discord!

A Project maintained and created by
